title: Belinda's Butter Chicken
description: A homemade butter chicken made with diced chicken, aromatic spices, tomatoes, cream, and fenugreek leaves, with an option to substitute paneer.
context: Can also use paneer ("paneer butter masala") instead of chicken.
steps: Melt a knob of butter over low heat.
Fry the onion until lightly browned and caramelised.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1–2 minutes until browned but not burnt.
Add the dried spices with a little water.
If the mixture gets too dry, add a little more butter or oil.
Add the chopped tomatoes and simmer on medium heat for about 10 minutes until browned.
Add the chicken, fenugreek leaves, sugar, and salt, and cook until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the cream to taste before serving.
